raw_consumer_statement: I am filing this new complaint because Citibank provided deceptive information in my previous cases. After reviewing the merchant logs that Citibank finally provided in their last response ( Attachment Page 7, Line 40 ), it is clearly stated : XXXX CALLED TO CANCEL THE BOOKING ' on XX/XX/year>. This directly contradicts the bank 's final response letter where they claimed there was no evidence of me contacting the merchant. The bank failed to conduct a fair or good-faith investigation and is ignoring their liability for 'Service Not Rendered ' under Regulation Z. I demand a full reversal of {$3000.00} based on this evidence found in the bank 's own records.
